scenes.visual_direction: Warm inviting outdoor setup — a person carrying/arranging chairs for a garden event, morning light, dignified single worker
Two grounds workers / gardeners talking calmly by a wheelbarrow or in a garden — friendly pair, African workers preferred
A single dignified confident gardener — calm, content, proud of the work, greenhouse or flowers
Two people in genuine attentive listening — one speaks, one listens with full attention, outdoors/garden/greenhouse, no office
A worker walking over to a colleague/foreman to check in, or showing progress on the grounds — friendly, brief
Two gardeners inspecting a plant problem together — heads together over seedlings, examining leaves, solving as a pair
Warm reflective closing — golden hour garden, sunrise path through grounds, gardener watering at sunset
